calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jan-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Petitioner, Stephan Saigh Lee sworn and examined. Court grants decree changing name to Stephen Paul Lee. Decree signed.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Off Calendar

Name Change On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 16,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on name change. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Plaintiff failed to provide notice of hearing to the mother. Court orders matter taken off calendar.
